subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Today the greatest service at the Sacred Threshold is firmness and steadfastness, and second is the glad-tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الیوم خدمت عظمی بعتبه علیاء ثبوت و استقامتست و ثانی مژده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
